question: उपजिल्ह्यांची नावे, वर्णानुक्रमाने क्रमवारी लावून, ज्यात किमान एक 'ग्रामीण' आणि किमान एक 'शहरी' वर्गीकृत क्षेत्र आहे.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_SECTOR_CATEGORY AS T3 ON T2.SECTOR_ID = T3.SECTOR_ID GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY = 'Rural' THEN T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY END) > 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY = 'Urban' THEN T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY END) > 0 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT dim_location.sub_district_name 
FROM dim_location 
JOIN fact_establishment_totals ON dim_location.location_id = fact_establishment_totals.location_id 
JOIN dim_sector_category ON fact_establishment_totals.sector_id = dim_sector_category.sector_id 
WHERE dim_sector_category.sector_category = 'Rural' 
OR dim_sector_category.sector_category = 'Urban' 
GROUP BY dim_location.sub_district_name 
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT dim_sector_category.sector_category) > 1 
ORDER BY dim_location.sub_district_name ASC;
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT dim_location.sub_district_name 
FROM dim_location 
JOIN fact_establishment_totals ON dim_location.location_id = fact_establishment_totals.location_id 
JOIN dim_sector_category ON fact_establishment_totals.sector_id = dim_sector_category.sector_id 
WHERE dim_sector_category.sector_category = 'Rural' 
OR dim_sector_category.sector_category = 'Urban' 
GROUP BY dim_location.sub_district_name 
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT dim_sector_category.sector_category) > 1 
ORDER BY dim_location.sub_district_name ASC;
